summary: Surfer Gallery (My Gallery) feature testing completed. Backend API tests all pass (11/11) after fixing purchase-history endpoint bug. Frontend UI fully functional with all marketplace features working: stats display, search/filter/sort, grid/list views, tabs, purchase history modal, and Review & Claim queue.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in surfer_gallery.py: GalleryPurchase model uses 'purchased_at' not 'created_at' (line 319)
Fixed bug in surfer_gallery.py: GalleryPurchase model uses 'amount_paid' not 'amount' (line 331)
SurferGallery.js correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Stats calculation in backend matches frontend display (5 Total, 1 Favorites, 2 Pro Tier, 3 Public, 2 Pending)
Claim queue correctly shows AI-suggested photos with confidence scores
seed_data_creation: Test surfer has 5 gallery items (2 pending payment, 2 PRO tier, 3 public, 1 favorited) and 1 claim queue item
context_for_next_testing_agent: Surfer Gallery feature fully implemented and tested. All backend endpoints working: /api/surfer-gallery (main gallery with stats), /api/surfer-gallery/claim-queue (AI suggestions), /api/surfer-gallery/pending-selections (count), /api/surfer-gallery/purchase-history (fixed). Frontend shows grid/list views, search/filter/sort, tabs for The Locker and Review & Claim, Purchase History modal.

main_gallery_endpoint.details: GET /api/surfer-gallery returns items array and stats object with correct counts

gallery_stats_structure.details: Stats include total, favorites, pro, public, pendingPayment - all integers

gallery_item_structure.details: Items include id, gallery_item_id, url, thumbnail_url, media_type, photographer_name, gallery_tier, is_paid, is_public, is_favorite

claim_queue_endpoint.details: GET /api/surfer-gallery/claim-queue returns items with confidence scores

purchase_history_endpoint.details: GET /api/surfer-gallery/purchase-history returns purchases array (fixed field names)

visibility_toggle_endpoint.details: PUT /api/surfer-gallery/{id}/visibility endpoint exists and accepts is_public parameter

favorite_toggle_endpoint.details: PUT /api/surfer-gallery/{id}/favorite endpoint exists and accepts is_favorite parameter

frontend_gallery_page.details: My Gallery page loads with title, stats cards, tabs, search bar, filter/sort dropdowns, view toggle

frontend_grid_view.details: Grid view shows 5 gallery items with PRO badges, favorite hearts, and 'Purchase to unlock' overlays

frontend_list_view.details: List view shows items with thumbnails, titles, photographer, date, location, and action buttons

frontend_review_claim_tab.details: Review & Claim tab shows AI-suggested photos with 'That's me!' and 'Not me' buttons

frontend_purchase_history_modal.details: Purchase History modal opens and shows 'No purchases yet' message

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to 'purchased_at' which is the correct field name in the model
Changed to 'amount_paid' which is the correct field name in the model
